segments.original_text: 実に重くのしかかっています

segments.text: So Wrath also had to mash out
segments.original_text: そこでWrath選手も暴発するしかないというか

segments.text: Game & Watch also has trouble securing KOs, so
segments.original_text: ゲームウォッチでもやっぱり撃墜が難しいので

segments.text: and that's when the opening just came around
segments.original_text: チャンスがちょっと巡ったところだったので

full_text: The pressure is really mounting. So Wrath also had to mash out. Game & Watch also has trouble securing KOs, so and that's when the opening just came around.

corrections.reason: 文脈上、暴発（暴れて攻撃）の意味
